children.heading: No effect on antitrust laws
children.label: a No effect on antitrust laws
children.text: Nothing in this title (or an amendment made by this title) shall be construed to modify, impair, or supersede the operation of any of the antitrust laws. For the purposes of this section, the term “antitrust laws” has the meaning given such term in subsection (a) of , except that such term includes to the extent that such section 45 applies to unfair methods of competition.11section 12 of title 15section 45 of title 15See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Rule of construction regarding Hawaii’s Prepaid Health Care Act
children.label: b Rule of construction regarding Hawaii’s Prepaid Health Care Act
children.text: Nothing in this title (or an amendment made by this title) shall be construed to modify or limit the application of the exemption for Hawaii’s Prepaid Health Care Act (Haw. Rev. Stat. §§ 393–1 et seq.) as provided for under .11section 1144(b)(5) of title 29

children.heading: Student health insurance plans
children.label: c Student health insurance plans
children.text: Nothing in this title (or an amendment made by this title) shall be construed to prohibit an institution of higher education (as such term is defined for purposes of the Higher Education Act of 1965 [ et seq.]) from offering a student health insurance plan, to the extent that such requirement is otherwise permitted under applicable Federal, State or local law.1120 U.S.C. 1001

children.heading: No effect on existing requirements
children.label: d No effect on existing requirements
children.text: Nothing in this title (or an amendment made by this title, unless specified by direct statutory reference) shall be construed to modify any existing Federal requirement concerning the State agency responsible for determining eligibility for programs identified in .11section 18083 of this title
